## 影響範囲 (任意)

- [ ] Application (Riverpod Provider 追加)
- [ ] Infrastructure (新規 adapter / 依存追加)
- [ ] Presentation (UI 追加)
- [ ] Native (Android 側修正)
- [ ] ドキュメントのみ
